headline: How The Synopsys (SNPS) Story Is Shifting Through The Ansys Integration And Transition Year
summary: The Synopsys fair value estimate is now set at US$534.65, compared with the previous US$533.52, reflecting only a marginal update to the model. Behind that small shift is a mixed analyst backdrop, with some focusing on earlier than expected Ansys related cost synergies and higher EPS guidance. Others flag decelerating electronic design automation growth, reset price targets down to US$480, US$455, and US$430, and softer IP trends. As you read on, you will see how these differing views shape...
